member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxAddTagByUserDefinitionTestMethod.UserInputParamType
member.summary: Indicate if the user input param is sku or recovery and if it comes from SharedStorage Keys or literal values.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ChunkBuilder.Chunk.ChunkData
member.summary: Gets or sets Chunk Data part.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ChunkBuilder.Chunk.ChunkCounter
member.summary: Gets or sets Chunk Counter part.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ChunkBuilde.ChunkCreator.#ctor(ConfigurationFiles.Pins)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.EndPatternsAction.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: additional packets to decode per behavior.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.EndPatternsAction.GetBehaviourType
member.summary: Return the behavior type for action.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.ErrorHandler.#ctor(ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketSettings,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.ErrorHandler.ConvertPacketError(System.Enum)
member.returns: converted enum packet error of type ErrorHandlingPerPacket.PacketError.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.ErrorHandler.StopDecoding(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketTypes.Packet)
member.summary: Execute the relevant behaviour command. Update the relevant packets counters, and return if the decoding process should be continue or not.
member.param: packet for checking and deciding the next step.
member.returns: true if decode should be continue or not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.ErrorHandler.StopExecutionOfNextPattern
member.summary: Indicates if decoding phase should run for the the next pattern. in case last behavior is NEXT_PATTERN -> True, false other.
member.returns: True if decoding should run for next pattern, false other.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.ErrorHandler.GetError
member.summary: Return the last error detected during the decoding. The last error is critical for taking decision of the port number.
member.returns: last error detected during the decoding phase.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.NextPatternAction.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ErrorHandle.NextPatternAction.GetBehaviourType
member.summary: Return the behavior type for action.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.IPacketBuilder.BuildPacketsInDfmMode(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Return packets per pattern based on DFM capture data.
member.param: fail Per Cycle for plist or pattern.

members.member:
Return packets per pattern based on DMEM capture data. Expectations: ctv should be only on one pin.
ctv data per pattern. /// dfm fails. list of packets per pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.IPacketBuilder.GetError
member.summary: Return the last error detected during the decoding stage.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder
member.summary: This class is responsible for building packets. It should be able to handle string of bits values, and create packets out of it. It should support DFM only.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder.#ctor(ConfigurationFiles.ConfigFile,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: true if debug on, false otherwise.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder.IsAllZerosPacket(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.ChunkBuilder.Chunk})
member.summary: Will check if the chunks builds up all zeros packets. Those kinds of packets need to be ignored by request of GFX users.
member.returns: true if this is all zero packet, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder.DecodeDMEMFailData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Decode failing data and return map of fields and data per pattern based on DMEM cature mode.
member.param: tv per pin. guaranteed that it has only one pin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilder.DecodeDFMFailData(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Decode failing data and return map of fields and data per pattern.

member.param: true if debug enabled, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.Interfaces.IGfxBaseParams
member.summary: Interface for defing the base Gfx params.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Area for Gfx test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.Interfaces.IGfxBaseParams.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the Content for GfxScoreboard TM.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.Interfaces.IGfxBaseParams.StartSku
member.summary: Gets or sets the start sku for Gfx test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.Interfaces.IGfxBaseParams.EndSku
member.summary: Gets or sets the end sku for Gfx test method.

member.summary: Gets or sets the tag for GfxScoreboard TM.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Hry tree level datalog for GfxScoreboard TM.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Area for Gfx test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.SetSkuBounds(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the start and end skus per area sku bounds. Those bounds will be used for the SKU resolution during the Evaluate API. This function saved the input sku bounds (start and end or one of them) to shared storage under a predefined key, for example, "GlobalStartSku_{area name}".
member.param: The area name. used for building the shared storage key.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.AreSkuBoundsValid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the per area sku boundaries are valid and exist in the database.
member.returns: if SkuBounds are Valid returns true, otherwise returns false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.ClearTags
member.summary: Clears all the saved tags in the area.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetUpsRecoveryStorageKey
member.summary: Gets the recovery for the input sku as defined in Aleph file.
member.returns: the recovery for the input sku as defined in Aleph file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetMatchedTagsForEvaluation
member.summary: Returning the matched regex tags for evaluation.
member.returns: list of tags per content which matched the regex.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetMatchedTagsForEvaluation(System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex)
member.summary: Returning the matched regex tags for evaluation.
member.param: The regular expression of the required tags.
member.returns: list of tags per content which matched the regex.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetMatchedTagsForEvaluation(System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex)
member.summary: Returning the matched regex tags for evaluation.
member.param: The regular expression of the required tags.
The regular expression of the optional tags.
member.returns: list of tags per content which matched the regex.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetEidsIdsPerRecoveryGroup
member.summary: gets only the eids ids for each Recovery Group.
member.returns: dictionary of Eids Ids per Recovery Group.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.EvaluateTags(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Returns the result of the evaluation.
member.returns: A tuple which contains:( eids statuses per recovery group, evaluation result, a multiple content evaluation flag).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.AddTestMethodTag(System.String)
member.summary: Adds Test Method tag, uses the current content eids , expected to update them before adding the tag.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.AddUserTagByRecoveryString(System.String,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Hry.HrySymbol,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Hry.HrySymbol)
member.summary: Creates new tag gived the sku per given area and content.

member.summary: Creates new tag gived the sku per given area and content.
member.param: Name of the sku or RecoveryGroup string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetHryTreeDatalog(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a list of hrytree nodes by the level num.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetSessionContext
member.summary: get the current session context from aggregator.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.CreateInitializeScbEids(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Initialize the scoreboard eids with the not tested status in the current content eids and creates a a structure to map between Id to eid.
member.returns: only the scoreboard eids with the not tested status.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.Evaluate(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Evaluates the EIDs dynamic data processed form plist execution results (CTVs) and returns the SKU object with the SKU data matching the EID status.
member.param: Boolean which indicates if the mode is per pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetAreaRecoveryGroupsNumber
member.summary: Returning the number of recovery groups in the area.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetHRYSymbol(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the symbols are valid.

member.param: The eids statuses per recovery group.
member.returns: All eids statuses in a space separated string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.GetEidNotTestedSymbol
member.summary: Get the hry symbol for EidNotTestedSymbol.

member.summary: Update the current content eids with the calculated ScoreBoard Eids Statuses.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator.ResetEidsStatuses
member.summary: Reset the content eids to the not tested status.

member.summary: This function is used to update all recovery groups with the failing eids received in function parameter.

member.param: if in per pattern mode, pass the pattern index to add the prints to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.Tag
member.summary: Gets or sets the tag name to create after decoding the HRY.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.TagPassSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the TagPassSymbol. This symbol will be used in the generated Tag to represent passing engine id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.TagFailSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the TagFailSymbol.This symbol will be used in the generated Tag to represent failing engine id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.HryMapKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated list of shared storage keys that hold the HRY - eid mapping.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.HryValueKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated list of shared storage keys that hold the HRY values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.HryPassSymbols
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated list of characters symbols that desribes pass status from the HRY received from another test method or user code.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxMbistHryToTagTestMethod.HryMappingConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigFile input file. This file holds the mapping from component name in the "HryMapKeys" shared storage, to actual eid.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.ConfigFileProcessed
member.summary: This file contains the raw parsed file + additional ready to consume variables for runtimes like dictionaries and etc.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.ConfigFileProcessed.RawConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets this is the raw parsed .json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.DatalogFormatters.PacketsDatalogFormatRaster
member.summary: Packets Datalog Format for Raster data.
this function gets dict holding the patterns and thiers pakets, returns string containing the pakets fields information in a comma separated list format.
member.param: holds a map from pattern name to list of packets.
the Array name for the raster header.
member.returns: string conatining the data to write to raster file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.DatalogFormatters.PacketsDatalogFormatRaster.SetRasterHeader(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the string bulider to contain the header data for raster.
member.param: the Array name for the raster header.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.DatalogFormatters.PacketsDatalogFormatScan
member.summary: Writer to write Gfx information to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PacketMonitor.DatalogFormatters.PacketsDatalogFormatScan.DatalogFields(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketTypes.Packet}})
member.summary: Print to scan datalog in this format: 2_plist_PacPlist3 2_tname_InstanceName 2_pttrn_PacMon_3 DSS_id_0_eid_0_hdata_000002_hdata_r_080000 _rge_bdata_r_010000000000000000000 DSS_id_0_eid_0_hdata_000001_hdata_r_000000 _rge_bdata_r_010000000111000000000 2_pttrn_PacMon_4 NO_FAIL 2_pttrn_PacMon_5 NO_FAIL.
member.param: holds a map from pattern name to list of packet fields.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with GFX aggregator injected for the UT .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with GFX aggregator injected for the UT .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator,Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.PacketBuilder.PacketBuilderCreator.IPacketBuilderCreator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with GFX aggregator injected for the UT .

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.ConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigFile input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.GfxAggregationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the GfxAggregation mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.EngineeringOutputFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets EngineeringOutputFilePath. Default value is empty string which will make prints go to datalog file based on PacketDatalogMode. If value is not empty, a new file will be created, and the packets prints are rerouted into this file. Please note the format of the prints is based on what selected on PacketDatalogMode. If PacketDatalogMode is Disabled Verify will fail.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.PatternsInPlist
member.summary: Gets or sets this is used in run time to log patterns that has no failures.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.DecideExitPort(ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.PacketError)
member.summary: This function should decide the exit port based on execution status.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.ExecutePlist
member.summary: This function will execute the func test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.SetupFunctionalTest
member.summary: This method should initialize functional test object, based on capture type (DFM/DMEM) requested by user in input file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.ParseInputFile
member.summary: This function should parse input .json file into a dedicated variable. Note that validation of the content is not here. See ValidateInputs().

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.GFXHandling
member.summary: When Gfx aggregation is ON, this function should do all what is related to Gfx service, like updaing failing EIDS, SKU calculation and more.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.PrimeGfxPacketMonitorTestMethod.GetFailingEIDSFromCapturedData
member.summary: This function processes the captured data and calls relevant APIs on PacketBuilder.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.GfxScoreBoard.GfxDataSlicer.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.GfxScoreBoard.ScoreBoardConfiguration,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Common.GfxAggregator,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Int32,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.GfxScoreBoard.ScoreBoardEid})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the config object for initialize the calculation parameters.
the Gfx Aggregator for getting to the content eids and HryHierarchy .
the mapping between id to tuple (id. pid) for each eid.

member.name: T:ConfigurationFiles.ConfigFile
member.summary: This class should hold the .json file fields and structure.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettings.CounterSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets CounterSettings. This is optional parameter.

member.name: T:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket
member.summary: Represent the behaviour for each type of packet.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.BehaviourType.NEXT_PATTERN
member.summary: Skip to next pattern after ‘delay’ number of packets.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.BehaviourType.END_PATTERNS_RETEST_ON
member.summary: Stop running patterns after ‘delay’ number of packets. This will continue on to the retests if appropriate.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.BehaviourType.END_PATTERNS_RETEST_OFF
member.summary: Stop running patterns and do not proceed to retests after ‘delay’ packets.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.PacketError.NoError
member.summary: No Error - default value. default behaviour for no error is CONTINUE.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.PacketError.MaxAmountOfPacketsReached
member.summary: Number of decoded patterns reached the max limit.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.Behaviour
member.summary: Gets or sets the behaviour for packetType.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.AdditionalPacketsToDecode
member.summary: Gets or sets additional number of packets to decode after error.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.Field.IsEidField
member.summary: Gets or sets if field is eid.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.Field.OverFlow
member.summary: Gets or sets OverFlow expected value.

member.name: M:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.Field.IsOverFlowDetected(System.String)
member.returns: true if overFlow detected, false other.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketConfiguration.ReportToGFXAggregator
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets ReportToGFXAggregator.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketSettings.MSBSideForFieldConversion.RIGHT
member.summary: MSB side is on the right of the binary value.

member.name: F:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketSettings.MSBSideForFieldConversion.LEFT
member.summary: MSB side is on the left of the binary value.

member.name: P:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketSettings.ErrorHandling
member.summary: Gets or sets error handling behaviour for all packet.

member.name: M:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketSettings.GetErrorHandlerForPacket(ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.ErrorHandlingPerPacket.PacketError)
member.summary: Return the expected behaviour for packet error type.

member.summary: get list of fields per packetId.

member.summary: return true if packet eid failures should be reported by GFX or not.

member.summary: Gets or sets the start value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the end value.

member.name: M:ConfigurationFiles.DecodeSettingsEntities.PacketType.ReportToGfx

member.returns: true if ON and False others.

member.summary: Gets or sets CounterPins. Optional. Not required in DFM mode. MSB to LSB.

member.summary: Gets or sets DataPins. MSB to LSB.
